name: The Ultimate Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a 9-inch single pie crust of your choice.
2. In a bowl, mix the first six ingredients together using a whisk to remove all lumps and thoroughly blend them.
3. Add whipping cream, sour cream, and beaten eggs to the mixture. Pour into the prepared pie crust.
4. Bake at 325°F for 55-60 minutes until the edges puff and the center is almost set.
5. Optionally, place a ring of foil around the crust edge to prevent over-browning during the last 15 minutes of baking.
Optional:
1. Spread apricot preserves over the bottom of the 9-inch pie crust.
2. Pour the prepared filling into the pie crust and bake as directed. The combination of apricot and pumpkin is absolutely delicious.
